metadata.description: Verified DAX patterns and business logic definitions - Source of Truth for AI-generated queries

patterns.logic_description: Returns revenue for the most recent quarter by first determining the maximum year, then the maximum quarter within that year.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
VAR MaxYear = MAX(Revenue[Revenue Reporting Year])
VAR MaxQuarter = CALCULATE(MAX(Revenue[Revenue Reporting Quarter]), Revenue[Revenue Reporting Year] = MaxYear)
RETURN
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    "Latest Year", IGNORE(MaxYear),
    "Latest Quarter", IGNORE(MaxQuarter),
    "Last Month Revenue",
    CALCULATE(
        SUM(Revenue[Revenue]),
        Revenue[Revenue Reporting Year] = MaxYear,
        Revenue[Revenue Reporting Quarter] = MaxQuarter
    )
)
patterns.usage_note: Always use VAR to first determine MaxYear, then MaxQuarter within that year. Use IGNORE() for display columns in SUMMARIZECOLUMNS.

patterns.logic_description: Counts all seizure records where the reporting year equals the current year using YEAR(TODAY()).
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
ROW(
    "Total Seizures This Year",
    CALCULATE(
        COUNTROWS(Seizure),
        Seizure[Seizure Reporting Year] = YEAR(TODAY())
    )
)
patterns.usage_note: Use ROW() for single value results. Use YEAR(TODAY()) for dynamic current year filtering.

patterns.logic_description: Returns the center (English description) with the highest total seizure count using TOPN and SUMMARIZE.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
TOPN(
    1,
    SUMMARIZE(
        Seizure,
        Seizure[Center Description En],
        "Total Seizures", COUNTROWS(Seizure)
    ),
    [Total Seizures], DESC
)
patterns.usage_note: Use TOPN(1, ..., [measure], DESC) pattern for finding maximum. SUMMARIZE creates the grouping.

patterns.logic_description: Counts CSDT cases grouped by MAST Type category in English.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'Seizure'[CSDT MAST Type En],
    "Count of CSDT Cases", COUNTROWS('Seizure')
)
patterns.usage_note: Use SUMMARIZECOLUMNS for grouped aggregations. COUNTROWS for counting records.

patterns.logic_description: Counts distinct institutes grouped by gender for the current academic year.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'HE Institutes'[Institute Gender EN],
    FILTER(
        'HE Institutes',
        'HE Institutes'[Academic Year] = YEAR(TODAY())
    ),
    "Count of Institute by Gender", DISTINCTCOUNT('HE Institutes'[Institute Name EN])
)
patterns.usage_note: Use DISTINCTCOUNT for unique counts. Use FILTER within SUMMARIZECOLUMNS for row-level filtering.

patterns.logic_description: Counts distinct institutes grouped by gender for the previous academic year (current year minus 1).
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'HE Institutes'[Institute Gender EN],
    FILTER(
        'HE Institutes',
        'HE Institutes'[Academic Year] = YEAR(TODAY()) - 1
    ),
    "Count of Institute by Gender", DISTINCTCOUNT('HE Institutes'[Institute Name EN])
)
patterns.usage_note: Use YEAR(TODAY()) - 1 for previous year. DISTINCTCOUNT ensures unique institute counting.

patterns.logic_description: Counts loans where Status is 'Approved' and ApprovalDate is not null.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
ROW(
    "Approved Loans Count",
    CALCULATE(
        COUNTROWS(Loans),
        Loans[Status] = "Approved",
        NOT(ISBLANK(Loans[ApprovalDate]))
    )
)
patterns.usage_note: Do not use simple COUNT; must use Status filter AND ApprovalDate validation with NOT(ISBLANK()).

patterns.logic_description: Calculates percentage growth comparing current year to previous year.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
VAR CurrentYear = YEAR(TODAY())
VAR CurrentYearValue = CALCULATE(SUM([Value]), [Year] = CurrentYear)
VAR PreviousYearValue = CALCULATE(SUM([Value]), [Year] = CurrentYear - 1)
RETURN
ROW(
    "YoY Growth %",
    DIVIDE(CurrentYearValue - PreviousYearValue, PreviousYearValue, 0) * 100
)
patterns.usage_note: Always use DIVIDE() to avoid division by zero errors. Multiply by 100 for percentage.

patterns.logic_description: Counts users where Status column equals 'Active'.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
ROW(
    "Active Users",
    CALCULATE(
        COUNTROWS(Users),
        Users[Status] = "Active"
    )
)
patterns.usage_note: Status must be exactly 'Active' - case sensitive match required.

patterns.logic_description: Calculates revenue minus tax deductions. Net Revenue = Gross Revenue - Tax Amount.
patterns.usage_note: Net Revenue must ALWAYS exclude tax. Never use Gross Revenue alone for Net calculations.

patterns.metric: ADHA House Exchange Requests by Year
patterns.logic_description: Returns the number of house exchange requests grouped by year, ordered chronologically.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZE(
    'ADHA Exchange Requests',
    'ADHA Exchange Requests'[Year],
    "Number of House Exchange Requests",
    SUM('ADHA Exchange Requests'[Number of house exchange requests])
)
ORDER BY
    'ADHA Exchange Requests'[Year]
patterns.usage_note: Use SUMMARIZE with ORDER BY for chronological grouping. SUM aggregates the request counts per year.

patterns.logic_description: Returns average loan installment percentage and number of customers in repayment stage, grouped by year and quarter.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZE(
    'ADHA Loan Instalments',
    'ADHA Loan Instalments'[Year],
    'ADHA Loan Instalments'[Quarter],
    "Average % of loan installment",
    AVERAGE('ADHA Loan Instalments'[Average % of loan installment]),
    "Number of Customers in repayment stage",
    AVERAGE('ADHA Loan Instalments'[Number of Customers in repayment stage])
)
ORDER BY
    'ADHA Loan Instalments'[Year]
patterns.usage_note: Use SUMMARIZE for multi-column grouping (Year + Quarter). AVERAGE for percentage and customer counts. Table is 'ADHA Loan Instalments' NOT 'Customer Repayment Status'.
columns_required: Number of Customers in repayment stage

patterns.metric: Number of Customers in Repayment Stage
patterns.logic_description: Returns the number of customers in the repayment stage from ADHA Loan Instalments data, grouped by year and quarter.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZE(
    'ADHA Loan Instalments',
    'ADHA Loan Instalments'[Year],
    'ADHA Loan Instalments'[Quarter],
    "Number of Customers in repayment stage",
    AVERAGE('ADHA Loan Instalments'[Number of Customers in repayment stage])
)
ORDER BY
    'ADHA Loan Instalments'[Year]
patterns.usage_note: CRITICAL: Table is 'ADHA Loan Instalments' - NOT 'Customer Repayment Status'. Column is [Number of Customers in repayment stage]. Use AVERAGE aggregation.
columns_required: Number of Customers in repayment stage

patterns.metric: Graduated Students in Federal Government by Institute
patterns.logic_description: Returns the total number of graduated students working in Federal Government, grouped by institute ID.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'GDS LGDS'[INSTITUTE_ID],
    "Total", [Total Number of Graduated Students have been working in Federal Government]
)
patterns.usage_note: Uses pre-defined measure [Total Number of Graduated Students have been working in Federal Government]. Group by INSTITUTE_ID.

patterns.metric: Graduated Students in Federal Government This Year by Institute
patterns.logic_description: Returns graduated students in Federal Government for the current year, filtered by Report Year = YEAR(TODAY()), grouped by institute.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'GDS LGDS'[INSTITUTE_ID],
    FILTER(
        'GDS LGDS',
        'GDS LGDS'[Report Year] = YEAR(TODAY())
    ),
    "Total", [Total Number of Graduated Students have been working in Federal Government]
)
patterns.usage_note: Use FILTER within SUMMARIZECOLUMNS for current year filtering. YEAR(TODAY()) ensures dynamic year.

patterns.logic_description: Returns total count of graduated students working in sectors other than Federal Government.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    "Total",
    [Total Number of Graduated Students have been working in Other Sector]
)
patterns.usage_note: Uses pre-defined measure for Other Sector employment. Returns single aggregated value.

patterns.logic_description: Returns the list/count of internationally accredited higher education programs.
patterns.verified_dax_pattern:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    "Total",
    [List of Internationally Accredited Higher Education Programs]
)
patterns.usage_note: Uses pre-defined measure for accredited programs. Returns aggregated total.

single_value_result.description: Use ROW() when returning a single calculated value

grouped_aggregation.description: Use SUMMARIZECOLUMNS for grouping with aggregations

top_n_items.description: Use TOPN with SUMMARIZE for finding top/bottom items

filtered_count.description: Use CALCULATE with COUNTROWS for filtered counts

current_year_filter.description: Use YEAR(TODAY()) for dynamic current year

distinct_count.description: Use DISTINCTCOUNT for unique value counting

safe_division.description: Always use DIVIDE() to prevent division by zero
